top_signals.title: I've worked with over 5,000 kids: I swear by this No. 1 parenting rule—it's 'surprisingly simple'
top_signals.summary: Child development expert Siggie Cohen, who has worked with over 5,000 families, shares one communication mistake she sees parents make every day. Here's why she says it can backfire, when to set clear boundaries and how to use questions more effectively.
